infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: RecipePilot needs access to your microphone for voice input when searching for recipes.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: RecipePilot needs speech recognition to convert your voice to text when searching for recipes.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RecipePilot needs camera access to photograph food and ingredients for recipe suggestions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RecipePilot needs access to your photo library to identify food and ingredients for recipe suggestions.

plugins.microphonePermission: RecipePilot needs access to your microphone for voice input when searching for recipes.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: RecipePilot needs speech recognition to convert your voice to text.

plugins.cameraPermission: RecipePilot needs camera access to photograph food and ingredients for recipe suggestions.
plugins.photosPermission: RecipePilot needs access to your photos to identify food and ingredients for recipe suggestions.
